everyday_sentence: Kaam aur ghar ka balance banana mushkil ho raha hai.

everyday_sentence: Jab tum dheere bolte ho toh expression clear rehti hai.
improved_sentence_1: Jab aap dheere bolte hain toh abhivyakti spasht rehti hai.
improved_sentence_2: Santulit gati se bolne par aapki abhivyakti adhik spasht, prabhavi aur sahaj lagti hai.

everyday_sentence: Yeh tip kaafi helpful hai, main aaj hi try karunga.

everyday_sentence: Aaj ki baatcheet meaningful thi, kaafi clarity mili.

improved_sentence_2: Aaj ka samvaad vaastav mein sarthak raha; isse anek uljhanein door hui aur aage ki disha spasht hui.

everyday_sentence: Haan, mujhe tumhara plan theek lag raha hai.
improved_sentence_1: Is yojana par meri sahmati hai, yeh theek lag rahi hai.
improved_sentence_2: Vichaar karne ke baad is yojana ko meri poorn sahmati hai; aap aage badh sakte hain.

everyday_sentence: Main nahi maanta ki abhi price badhana chahiye.

everyday_sentence: Meri ek request hai, file aaj bhej dena.

everyday_sentence: Ek guzaarish hai, phone silent kar lo.

everyday_sentence: Kya mujhe kal ghar se kaam karne ki permission mil sakti hai?

everyday_sentence: Bas do minute wait karo, main aa raha hoon.

everyday_sentence: Agar yeh option mehnga hai toh doosra dekhte hain.
